context.description: the code to explain, filled into the prompt body

question.description: declared for the union of double-brace tokens present in the shared payload file; not filled by the explanation builder

additionalInstructions.description: declared for the union of double-brace tokens present in the shared payload file; not filled by the explanation builder

conversationHistory.description: declared for the union of double-brace tokens present in the shared payload file; not filled by the explanation builder

checks: explanation covers what the code does, how it fits the system, dependencies, quality, and usage patterns

provider.notes: filled by PromptTemplateBuilder.buildExplanationPrompt(); only {{context}} is substituted, but the union of prompt-templates.ts double-brace tokens is declared because the scanner reads the whole file (unused = WARN only)
